description_long: This is a tall, slender street light with a single, long, angled arm extending outward from the top of a vertical pole. The pole is metallic and plain, with a smooth cylindrical shape and a slightly wider base for stability. The arm features a lattice-like support structure, providing both strength and a modern aesthetic. At the end of the arm is a streamlined, modern lamp head with a flat, slightly curved cover, likely housing an LED or similar light source. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban streets, highways, or large parking areas. The surface appears metallic with a matte or slightly glossy finish, and there are no visible decorative elements on the pole.
description: A tall, modern street light with a single angled arm and a streamlined lamp head, featuring a plain metallic pole and a lattice support structure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the angled arm, the lattice support, and the lamp head at the end.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pole as a thin vertical line, with the arm and lamp head barely visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the arm, lattice support, and lamp head from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole as a thin vertical line, with the arm and lamp head extending away from the viewer.
attribute_lamp_head_design: A streamlined, modern lamp head with a flat, slightly curved cover and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
